grades.expectation: Response mentions checking competentperson.co.uk to verify if installer was registered
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions searching competentperson.co.uk website to check for self-certification

grades.expectation: Response mentions FENSA specifically as the relevant competent person scheme for windows
grades.reason: Clearly identifies FENSA as one of the most common schemes for windows alongside CERTASS

grades.expectation: Response distinguishes between self-certification (competent person) and local authority routes
grades.reason: Clearly distinguishes between self-certification via competent person schemes and regularisation through local authority

grades.expectation: Response warns about the 'no approach' rule before pursuing indemnity insurance
grades.reason: Explicitly states 'Do not contact the local authority building control department' and explains indemnity insurance becomes unavailable if council is notified

grades.expectation: Response mentions Part L (energy efficiency/insulation) as relevant regulation for windows
grades.reason: Opens by stating replacement windows must comply with Part L covering thermal performance and energy efficiency
